text: On the strategic front, NVIDIA's recent multiyear agreements to invest $2 billion each in Coherent and Lumentum, alongside multibillion-dollar purchase commitments and future capacity rights, suggests management is proactively redefining its moat by pre-buying advanced optics capacity [0aa6a797-836f-43db-8358-724d2dac0a0b]. Following the earnings report, Bank of America reset its price target [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c].

issues.explanation: The cited chunks do not contain the specific information about Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $220. Chunk [de81755d-f657-4d81-ac51-0e4d3302477e] is titled 'Veteran analyst sends shocking message on Nvidia after earnings' but the visible snippet does not mention Deutsche Bank or the $220 price target. Chunk [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c] only covers Bank of America's price target reset. While the factual claims are consistent with Previously Verified Facts, the specific citations do not support the Deutsche Bank claim.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite the correct chunk(s) that contain the Deutsche Bank $220 price target information, or restructure the citation to only attribute the Bank of America claim to chunk [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c] and find appropriate support for the Deutsche Bank claim.

revision_history.original_text: On the strategic front, NVIDIA's recent multiyear agreements to invest $2 billion each in Coherent and Lumentum, alongside multibillion-dollar purchase commitments and future capacity rights, suggests management is proactively redefining its moat by pre-buying advanced optics capacity [0aa6a797-836f-43db-8358-724d2dac0a0b]. Analyst reactions remain mixed, with Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $220 while Bank of America reset its price target following the earnings report [de81755d-f657-4d81-ac51-0e4d3302477e, 09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c].
revision_history.revised_text: On the strategic front, NVIDIA's recent multiyear agreements to invest $2 billion each in Coherent and Lumentum, alongside multibillion-dollar purchase commitments and future capacity rights, suggests management is proactively redefining its moat by pre-buying advanced optics capacity [0aa6a797-836f-43db-8358-724d2dac0a0b].
